author: y4rr
content: [result] Eliminated Dropout2d GPU roundtrip by replacing the broken CPU-passthrough GPU path with a hard NotImplementedOnCuda error. Also added CUDA error checks to DropoutBackward and Dropout2dBackward. The previous GPU path was doing: upload onesâ†’dropoutâ†’download maskâ†’download inputâ†’CPU multiplyâ†’re-upload, which defeated the purpose. Regular Dropout forward remains GPU-native via dropout_philox_f32. All 23 dropout tests pass.
